artifacts.claim_boundary: This witness binds the immutable target-owned native receipt to its exact run, checks, and non-calibration native obligations.

claim_boundary: SkillGuard supervises the complete native kb-organization-maintenance maintenance unit, its target-specific obligations, and the sole current enforced closure. It does not ship with or execute on the consumer machine.

depth_profile.claim_boundary: Only exact current receipts for the target skill's declared checks are supervised. The target skill retains all domain judgment, including positive/shallow behavior and direct native completion.

functions.business_intent: Maintain shared organization knowledge while preserving local adoption and executable-safety authority.
functions.signature: Input x State -> Set(Output x State)

obligations.description: Require validated settings and explicit organization-maintenance participation.
Validate organization layout, manifest, repository state, and entry lanes.
Inspect main cards, imports, candidates, hashes, and cleanup proposals.
Give every reviewed card exactly one keep, watch, or change decision with a reason and complete review dimensions.
Record merge, split, promotion, rejection, watch, or rewrite decisions.
Enforce Skill safety, hash, original-author, fork, and latest-version boundaries.
Apply only exact selected action ids and preserve local adoption authority.
Run post-apply organization checks and use their decision to gate the GitHub label.
Record a complete no-op, applied, blocked, or failure receipt.
Reject inspection-only completion and require the full native receipt.

action.summary: Load the target-owned inputs and prove every intake obligation before mutation.
Run the native maintenance owner through every declared execution branch.
Require the current terminal receipt plus positive and shallow target-owned checks before closure.
